subcodes.first_line: O Abu-Talib! Hearken unto the call of the Desired One, then act according to that which He counseleth thee, for verily He commandeth thee naught save that which is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ابوطالب اسمع ندآء المطلوب ثم اعمل بما ینصحک به و انه لایامرک الا بما هو
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @wisdom [hikmat]
